subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! The honored pilgrim, namesake of the Desired One, Áqá Ḥusayn, upon his return [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران روحانی جناب زائر سمی حضرت مقصود آقا حسین دفتر اسماای بعد از مراجعت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @growth of the Cause, @power of prayer, @love of God
